patches.command:
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
printf "%s" "PAYLOADER_MARKER" > "$WORK/marker.txt"
(cd "$WORK" && zip -q PAYLOADER_MARKER.zip marker.txt)
unzip -Z1 "$WORK/PAYLOADER_MARKER.zip"

patches.command:
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
php -d session.save_path="$WORK" -r 'session_id("PAYLOADERMARKER");session_start();$_SESSION["marker"]="PAYLOADER_MARKER";session_write_close();'
grep --fixed-strings "PAYLOADER_MARKER" "$WORK/sess_PAYLOADERMARKER"
